name: Heigel Park
description: Heigel Park is a place to play pickleball in Port Clinton, OH. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Hopfinger Zimmerman Park
description: Hopfinger Zimmerman Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Port Clinton, OH. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can’t reserve the courts. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free.

name: the BackYard a pickleball & social club
description: Come play pickleball at the BackYard a pickleball & social club in Lakeside Marblehead, OH! There are 6 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Reservations are available. Amenities include restrooms, trainers or lessons, and food.

name: Williams Tennis Campus
description: Williams Tennis Campus is a place to play pickleball in Lakeside Marblehead, OH. There are 12 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include lights, water, youth programming, and trainers or lessons. A one-time fee is required to play.
